0 AND-NOT 37

Preferred from left
0 AND-NOT 37
1 I 4
2 I 5
3 I 6
4 I 7

6 I 1
7 I 2

Matched
0 AND-NOT 37
1 I 4
2 I 5
3 I 6
4 I 7
5 I 0
6 I 1
7 I 2

Applying to 01000011
Input
I 0 = 0
I 1 = 1
I 2 = 0
I 3 = 0
I 4 = 0
I 5 = 0
I 6 = 1
I 7 = 1
Output
0 AND-NOT 37 = AND(I 3,I 7n) = AND(I 3,NOT(I 7)) = AND(0,NOT(1)) = AND(0,0) = 0
1 I 4 = 0
2 I 5 = 0
3 I 6 = 1
4 I 7 = 1
5 I 0 = 0
6 I 1 = 1
7 I 2 = 0

\boxed{00011010}
